content: Cytoscape.js/vis-network/Sigma.js/react-force-graph all provide: click/hover/select events, pan/zoom, box selection, drag nodes, camera/viewport control. Sigma.js (WebGL) scales to 100k-500k nodes; Cytoscape.js (Canvas/SVG) degrades ~10k nodes. react-force-graph-3d (Three.js) exposes nodeThreeObject, linkDirectionalParticles, camera control modes (trackball/orbit/fly), node/link hover+click.
